items.headline: Chasing History: A New York Sweep
items.description: The Knicks clinch against the Sixers in game 4 in convincing and historic fashion, winning their 7th straight postseason game, a franchise record.

items.headline: Game Recap: Timberwolves 114, Spurs 109
items.description: The Timberwolves defeated the Spurs 114-109 in Game 4 to even the series at 2-2.

items.headline: Spurs backcourt combines for 68 points in Game 4 road loss
items.description: De'Aaron Fox (24), Stephon Castle (20) and Dylan Harper(24) tallied 68 point in Game 4's loss.

items.headline: Ant propels Timberwolves with clutch 4th quarter
